sqlMap.select: SELECT taskid, parentid, ownerid, creatorid, case when #primary# = 1 then creatorname else creatorName2 end as creatorname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(createdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as createDate, taskstatus, completerate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(completedate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as completedate, importance, hasshare, hasattach, hascomment, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as enddate, A.title as title, contentpath, tasktype, updatetime, newanswer, newrefer, personid, personname, personname2, persondeptname, persondeptname2, B.mail as personemail, personattach, personcontentpath, taskpersonid, case when #primary# = 1 then taskpersonname else taskPersonName2 end as taskpersonname FROM TBL_TASK A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.personid = B.cn WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#

SELECT taskID, commentid, commentorid, case when #primary# = 1 then commentorname else commentorname2 end as commentorname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(commentdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as commentdate, comment FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#

SELECT sharerid, case when #primary# = 1 then sharername else sharername2 end as sharername, case when #primary# = 1 then sharerdeptname else sharerdeptname2 end as sharerdeptname FROM TBL_TASKSHARE WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_TASK (parentid, ownerid, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, createdate, taskstatus, completerate, completedate, importance, hasshare, hasattach, startdate, enddate, title, contentpath, tasktype, updatetime, personid, personname, personname2, persondeptname, persondeptname2, taskpersonid, taskpersonname, taskpersonname2, tenantid) VALUES
(0, #ownerID#, #creatorID#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #nowDate#, #taskStatus#, 0, '', #importance#, #hasShare#, #hasAttach#, #startDate#, #endDate#, #title#, #contentPath#, #taskType#, #nowDate#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #personDeptName#, #personDeptName2#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #tenantID#)
(#parentID#, #sharerID#, #creatorID#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #nowDate#, #taskStatus#, 0, '', #importance#, #hasShare#, #hasAttach#, #startDate#, #endDate#, #title#, #contentPath#, #taskType#, #nowDate#, #sharerID#, #sharerName#, #sharerName2#, #sharerDeptName#, #sharerDeptName2#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #tenantID#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

INSERT INTO TBL_TASKSHARE (taskid, sharerid, sharername, sharername2, sharerdeptname, sharerdeptname2, hasmemo, hasattach, updatetime, neworder, tenantid) VALUES (#taskID#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #personDeptName#, #personDeptName2#, '', #hasAttach#, #nowDate#, 'Y', #tenantID#)

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_TASK SET hascomment=#hasComment# WHERE tenantID = #tenantID# AND (taskid = #taskID# OR parentID = #taskID#)

UPDATE TBL_TASK SET hascomment=#hasComment# WHERE tenantID = #tenantID# AND (taskid = #taskID# OR parentID = #taskID#) AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# ) IS NULL

sqlMap.update: INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCOMMENT (taskid, commentorid, commentorname, commentorname2, commentdate, comment, tenantID) VALUES (#taskID#, #commentorID#, #commentorName#, #commentorName2#, #nowDate#, #comment#, #tenantID#)
UPDATE TBL_TASK SET taskstatus = #taskStatus#, completerate = #completeRate# WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND (taskid = #taskID# OR parentid = #taskID#)
UPDATE TBL_TASK SET personattach = #personAttach#, personcontentpath = #personContentPath# WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND (taskid = #taskID# OR parentid = #taskID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# AND commentid = #commentID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL((SELECT delaycolor FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID#), '##FF0000') as delaycolor

SELECT taskID, parentID, ownerID, creatorID, creatorName, creatorName2, importance, hasAttach, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startDate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as endDate, title, taskType, taskStatus, completeRate, completeDate, personID, personName, personName2, taskPersonID, taskPersonName, taskPersonName2, hasComment FROM TBL_TASK WHERE
taskPersonid = #memberID# AND personid = taskpersonid
creatorid = #memberID# AND parentid = 0 AND tasktype != 1
creatorid = #memberID# AND parentid = 0 AND tasktype != 1
AND tenantid = #tenantID# ORDER BY startDate DESC
SELECT COUNT(taskID) FROM TBL_TASK WHERE taskPersonid = #memberID# AND personid = taskpersonid AND tenantid = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(taskID) FROM TBL_TASK WHERE creatorid = #memberID# AND parentid = 0 AND tasktype != 1 AND tenantid = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCONFIG (userid, delaycolor, autodelete, tenantid) VALUES (#memberID#, #delayColor#, #autoDelete#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_TASK (parentid, ownerid, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, createdate, taskstatus, completerate, completedate, importance, hasshare, hasattach, hascomment, startdate, enddate, title, contentpath, tasktype, updatetime, newanswer, newrefer, personid, personname, personname2, persondeptname, persondeptname2, taskpersonid, taskpersonname, taskpersonname2, tenantid)
VALUES (0, #ownerID#, #creatorID#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #updateTime#, #taskStatus#, 0, '', #importance#, #hasShare#, #hasAttach#, 'N', #startDate#, #endDate#, #title#, #contentPath#, #taskType#, #updateTime#, #newAnswer#, #newRefer#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #personDeptName#, #personDeptName2#, #taskPersonID#, #taskPersonName#, #taskPersonName2#, #tenantID#)
VALUES (0, #ownerID#, #creatorID#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #updateTime#, #taskStatus#, 0, '', #importance#, #hasShare#, #hasAttach#, 'N', #startDate#, #endDate#, #title#, #contentPath#, #taskType#, #updateTime#, #newAnswer#, #newRefer#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #personDeptName#, #personDeptName2#, #taskPersonID#, #taskPersonName#, #taskPersonName2#, #tenantID#)
VALUES (0, #ownerID#, #creatorID#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #updateTime#, #taskStatus#, 0, '', #importance#, #hasShare#, #hasAttach#, 'N', #startDate#, #endDate#, #title#, #contentPath#, #taskType#, #updateTime#, #newAnswer#, #newRefer#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #personDeptName#, #personDeptName2#, #taskPersonID#, #taskPersonName#, #taskPersonName2#, #tenantID#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

INSERT INTO TBL_TASK (parentid, ownerid, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, createdate, taskstatus, completerate, completedate, importance, hasshare, hasattach, hascomment, startdate, enddate, title, contentpath, tasktype, updatetime, newanswer, newrefer, personid, personname, personname2, persondeptname, persondeptname2, taskpersonid, taskpersonname, taskpersonname2, tenantid) VALUES (#taskID#, #ownerID#, #creatorID#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #updateTime#, #taskStatus#, 0, '', #importance#, #hasShare#, #hasAttach#, 'N', #startDate#, #endDate#, #title#, #contentPath#, #taskType#, #updateTime#, #newAnswer#, #newRefer#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #personDeptName#, #personDeptName2#, #taskPersonID#, #taskPersonName#, #taskPersonName2#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_TASKSHARE (taskid, sharerid, sharername, sharername2, sharerdeptname, sharerdeptname2, completerate, completedate, hasmemo, hasattach, updatetime, neworder, tenantid) VALUES (#taskID#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #personDeptName#, #personDeptName2#, 0, '', '', #hasAttach#, #updateTime#, 'Y', #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_TASKATTACH (taskid, filesize, filename, filepath, type, tenantid) VALUES (#taskID#, #fileSize#, #fileName#, #filePath#, #taskType#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TASKCONFIG SET delaycolor = #delayColor#, autodelete = #autoDelete# WHERE userid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_TASK WHERE
taskid = #taskID# or parentid = #taskID#
taskid = #taskID#
parentid = #taskID#
AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKSHARE WHERE taskid = #taskID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKATTACH WHERE taskid = #taskID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
